title: ComputeRunRequest
description: Request body for POST /runs — initiates a domain compute run in a workspace

dataset_ref.description: raw_data_id from /datasets/ingest response — references immutable stored data

assumptions.description: P3: explicit scientific assumptions for this run

parameters.description: Method-specific parameters — validated against domain MethodManifest.parameters_schema

compute_class.description: Optional compute class hint — defaults to classical if omitted
